title: Multi-Terminal Management
description: Create, manage, and monitor multiple Claude Code instances simultaneously with tab-based interface and drag-and-drop reordering.

title: Smart Grid View
description: View up to 8 terminals simultaneously with intelligent auto-layout. Navigate with keyboard arrows and context menus.

title: Configuration Profiles
description: Save and load custom terminal configurations with pre-configured CLI flags, environment variables, and working directories.

title: Auto-Updates
description: Automatic update checks on startup with background downloads and one-click installation. Never miss a release.

title: Keyboard Shortcuts
description: Comprehensive keyboard shortcuts for power users. Command palette (F1), session history (F2), and more.

title: Agent Teams Panel
description: Monitor Claude Code multi-agent team sessions with real-time team structure, member details, and task tracking.
